status: Repository readiness package — PROD schema still blocked (Zoom Attendance missing). Automations remain OFF. Do not install 115 in PROD.
assumptions: Automation status/action wording may vary by deployed Airtable script action; observable writes and non-writes are the acceptance criteria.
Gate outcome depends on the fixture's configured Level Gate Rules; this snapshot asserts counting and ownership, not a particular level name.

recordingXpCreate.run: 117 v1.1.1 with recordId=recTestZARecordingApproved and blank webhookUrl

duplicateRetry.precondition: An active recording XP Event already exists with the exact recording key.
duplicateRetry.run: Run 117 again with the same recordId.

conflictSoftVoid.precondition: recTestEnrollment is an Attendee of recTestZoomMeetingLive and recTestExistingLiveXP is active.
conflictSoftVoid.run: Run 117 or 117c against the conflicting recording row.

expectedWrites.recordingXp: No new active recording XP; if one already exists for this synthetic key, set Active? to false.

gateEligibility.run: 042 v3.1 after recTestEnrollment re-enters view 042 with Level Recalc Needed? checked.

expectedWrites.enrollment: Current/Next Level, Level Gate Rule, Level Status, and Level Recalc Needed? update according to existing gate rules.
expectedWrites.zoomAttendance: Gate Credit Applied? becomes true only if the approved non-conflicting recording meeting is actually counted.

expectedNonWrites: double-count of same meeting if live attendance exists

perfectWeekEligibility.run: 057 v1.3 after the WAS condition Perfect Week Calculation Queue? = 1 is newly matched.

expectedWrites.weeklyAthleteSummary: Perfect Week helper fields/status update; completion status becomes Ready when processing succeeds.
expectedWrites.zoomAttendance: Perfect Week Credit Applied? becomes true only if the approved non-conflicting recording meeting is actually counted.

expectedNonWrites: double-count of same meeting if live attendance exists

emailSkipWebhookBlank.run: 117 v1.1.1 with webhookUrl blank, or 117f with no webhook configuration.
expectedNonWrites: XP Event changes caused by email failure
